Scientific Projects

One of the primary policies of Dogus, University is to increase the number and quality of scientific research projects (BAP) and non-BAP projects. In this context, priority is given to projects with the following characteristics.

Projects supported by international / national funds

Joint projects with other international / national scientific organizations

Projects involving more than one faculty member

Interdisciplinary projects

Projects involving university-industry cooperation

Infrastructure projects prepared for the establishment of educational and research infrastructures (laboratories, etc.) of the departments

Projects whose results may be published and / or patented in peer-reviewed journals with international indexes

Projects with the potential to implement the results with content and visual results that may contribute to university-industry cooperation.
